content.full_text:
May 11, 2001

Thomas F. Palmeri, Coucilman
City of Covina
Post Office Box 1752
Covina, CA 91722

Re: Your Request for Advice
    Our File No. W-01-105

Dear Mr. Palmeri:

Thank you for your recent voicemail message. This letter is to confirm that you have withdrawn your request for advice, dated May 1, 2001, regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division
